    Stay secure

    Explore Articles by Category:
    All Choose the best Set it up Get productive Stay secure Play Windows Learning Center

    • 4 MIN READ

      Microsoft Pluton: The heart of Surface security

      Pluton is the ultimate security chip. It’s more secure, easier to update, and built into the CPU.

    • 4 MIN READ

      Work remote, securely with Surface

      Count on Surface built-in security features and a few best practices. Work remote worry free.

    • 3 MIN READ

      Microsoft Defender: Surface laptop’s best ally

      Ever wondered how a Surface laptop stays safe from online threats? It's all thanks to Microsoft Defender.

    • 2 MIN READ

      The role of Cybersecurity and Microsoft Surface devices

      Cybersecurity is more critical than ever. Safeguarding your devices and data from threats is a priority.

    • 2 MIN READ

      What is a phishing attack?

      Phishing is a prevalent and dangerous form of cybercrime. Don’t be tricked into revealing sensitive information.

    • 2 MIN READ

      What is an online scam? 

      Be vigilant. Understand fraudulent online scams.

    • 2 MIN READ

      What is Spyware?

      Computers and devices are prime targets of malicious software, like Spyware. Protect yourself.

    • 2 MIN READ

      5 Windows cybersecurity features for data safety

      Learn how Windows keeps your data safer with antivirus software, Windows Defender, and more.

    • 2 MIN READ

      All about firewalls, and how to configure yours

      Explore how a firewall keeps you safe and how to set it up for enhanced online security.

    • 2 MIN READ

      The unofficial history of passwords

      Learn about the simple beginnings and evolution of this crucial element of online safety.

    • 2 MIN READ

      Does Windows 11 need antivirus on laptops?

      Learn about built-in Windows 11 antivirus features and whether you need anything more.

    • 2 MIN READ

      What is secure boot?

      Bad actors are so sneaky, they can install bugs that harm your computer before it’s even fully powered up. Luckily, there’s Secure Boot.

    • 2 MIN READ

      How to change your Surface device password

      Learn how to change the password on your Surface, and protect your device and private information.

    • 2 MIN READ

      How to update drivers on your Surface device

      Keeping its operating system updated helps protect your files and personal information.

      The top 5 Surface security features

      Enhance your online security with preferences to fit your needs.
